title: Keyboard
drDigitalIntro: Next is your keyboard — what you type on. It has somewhere between 80 and 100 buttons, called keys, that let you type numbers, letters, and symbols. Let's try it out: type my name into the box below.

playgroundTask.instructions: Type in the name of your teacher into the box.

drDigitalSuccess: That's me! Nicely typed. You've got the hang of the keyboard already.
drDigitalHint: Try typing my full name exactly as I introduced myself: Doctor Digital. Capitalization doesn't matter, just the letters.
